mapper.insert: insert into admin(username, password, phone, email) values( #{username}, #{password}, #{phone}, #{email})
mapper.update: update admin set password =#{newPass} where username = #{username} and password = #{password}
update admin set username = #{username}, phone = #{phone}, email = #{email} ,updatetime = #{updatetime} ,status = #{status} where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select * from admin order by id desc

select * from admin
username like concat('%', #{ username },'%')
order by id desc
select * from admin where username =#{username} and password = #{password}
